## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Ruff clean (`uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .`)
- [ ] If adding to kb/, ran `uv run python scripts/validate_kb.py` locally and it passed
- [ ] If adding new tool-version entry, included `release_source` URL pointing to authoritative documentation
- [ ] DEVLOG.md updated for substantive changes
- [ ] No content from any employer, client, or third-party confidential source has been introduced
- [ ] Linked to related Issue or Discussion (if applicable)
